properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 52/25
 1. ANDOEYA SPACE WILL CONDUCT LAUNCH OPERATIONS FROM 12 MAY TO 16 MAY DAILY FROM 1600-0200 UTC. MARITIME TRAFFIC IS REQUESTED TO BE AWARE OF THE FOLLOWING DANGER AREA;
  
 A. 70-03.90N 015-34.14E.
 B. 70-09.30N 016-17.94E.
 C. 69-30.54N 016-59.04E.
 D. 69-25.14N 016-20.16E.

 2. FOR COORDINATION, ANDOEYA SPACE OPERATIONS CENTER CAN BE REACHED ON. TELEPHONE +47 94 07 59 44 / +47 76 14 45 87 OR MARITIME VHF CH 14/16 (CALLSIGN “ANDOEYA SPACE”). E-MAIL MSO@ANDOYASPACE.NO.

 3. FOR FURTHER DETAILS SEE  WWW.ANDOYASPACE.NO FOR DAILY UPDATES AND MAPS.
 4. CANCEL THIS WARNING 160200 UTC MAY 2025.
